method: Evidence-based analysis from existing experimental results

sensitivity_ranking.evidence: NL=2.0 yields 27.72% accuracy (Task 35), fundamental boundary for gradient-scaling approximation
sensitivity_ranking.trend: NL>2.0 is hard boundary; training becomes ineffective

sensitivity_ranking.evidence: Standard HAT collapses to 10% on fresh instances; Ensemble HAT recovers to 86.37% (Task 37)
Zhang 2025 profile uses G_range=47.3 vs canonical 10; Zhang case study achieves 88.53%
sensitivity_ranking.trend: Higher G_range helps, but diminishing returns beyond 20-50

sensitivity_ranking.evidence: V7/V8 show ~79% plateau after 10s; early drop from ~91% to ~82% at 1s
sensitivity_ranking.trend: Determines early accuracy drop; less critical for long-term
Sets long-term floor; stable after initial decay

sensitivity_ranking.evidence: A_0=0.6 means 60% never decays; sets accuracy floor
V6 shows +5.8pp compensation gain for gamma=2.0; but only affects opto mode
sensitivity_ranking.trend: Sublinear response requires compensation; linear OK

sensitivity_ranking.evidence: EXP-A shows C2C variations have 0.00pp impact when D2D dominates
Scale-masking absorbs quantization noise; 4-bit sufficient in canonical regime
sensitivity_ranking.trend: ADC 6-bit is real bottleneck, not conductance states

sensitivity_ranking.evidence: Affects SNR in high-dark regimes; negligible in normal operation

P0_must_measure.justification: These drive fundamental system behaviors: trainability, transferability, and dynamic range
P0_must_measure.minimum_viable_dataset: If only 4 parameters can be measured, these are the ones

P1_nice_to_have.justification: Affects absolute accuracy but trends are predictable from literature

P2_can_proxy.justification: Either sub-resolution in our regime or have workarounds
P2_can_proxy.use_case: Use literature values without significant accuracy loss

implications_for_paper.simulation_only_defense: With P0 parameters from literature, our predictions are anchored to physical reality for the most impactful parameters
implications_for_paper.measured_data_value: Real NL and D2D data would validate the Ensemble HAT and hard boundary claims
implications_for_paper.acceptable_proxy: C2C and n_states can remain proxied; these are not dominant error sources

confidence: MEDIUM - Based on existing experimental evidence, not new sweeps
